items.name_cn:
[Best Seller Large] 🆕 In Stock
 Neo Cagole New Motorcycle Bag 💋
Parisian brand's new motorcycle bag, reshaping the classic silhouette and infusing new soul into the 'motorcycle bag'. Crafted from top-tier imported Italian bursting sheepskin, it retains the original DNA of classic motorcycle bags with flat rivets, exquisite buckles, and fringe zippers. It adds adjustable woven shoulder straps and a cute playful heart-shaped mirror, perfectly softening the original unisex temperament. 🧐 Vintage revival, a favorite among fashionistas. 👄 Size: 38*17*24cm
